name: Shakespearean Mode
author: itz-mune
description: Hark! Doth make the assistant speaketh in Early Modern English.
long_description: Applies a system prompt prefix that instructs the AI to respond in Shakespearean / Early Modern English — thou, thee, doth, hark, forsooth, and all. A delightful way to make any topic feel more dramatic.

changelog.1.0.0: Initial release. Hark, what light through yonder window breaks!
